content.title: Unique VASP identification
content.text: Every digital wallet provider gets a globally recognized ORIC code.

content.title: Enhanced security
content.text: ORIC prevents fraud by ensuring wallet authenticity before transactions

content.title: Seamless interoperability
content.text: ORIC makes it easier for VASPs, financial institutions, and regulators to track and verify digital asset transactions.

content.title: Flexible and multi-asset
content.text: ORIC supports crypto and fiat payments, making it future-proof.
